message:
fix(demo): add visible borders to quote panel (bd-1swk)

Changed quote panel from SIMPLE box style (no outer borders) to
default ROUNDED style which provides subtle visible borders.

This makes the quote visually distinct from surrounding content
while still being lightweight with the dim border styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-{"id":"bd-1lwb","title":"Wide terminal (382+ cols) causes excessive whitespace in multiple scenes","description":"## Description
When running demo_showcase on a very wide terminal (382+ columns in user's case), multiple scenes have excessive whitespace and poor layout.

## Affected Scenes
1. Hero - content left-aligned with empty right side
2. Layout - columns have huge gaps
3. Composition cards - excessive spacing between panels

## Root Cause
Many renderables don't have max_width constraints, so they expand to fill the terminal width even when that produces ugly output.

## Expected Behavior
Scenes should have sensible max widths (e.g., 120-160 columns) and center content when terminal is wider.

## Files
- src/bin/demo_showcase/*.rs (all scenes)
- Potentially add a DemoConfig max_width setting","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-29T00:20:48.695066429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:23:19.475756335Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-1lwb","title":"Wide terminal (382+ cols) causes excessive whitespace in multiple scenes","description":"## Description
When running demo_showcase on a very wide terminal (382+ columns in user's case), multiple scenes have excessive whitespace and poor layout.

## Affected Scenes
1. Hero - content left-aligned with empty right side
2. Layout - columns have huge gaps
3. Composition cards - excessive spacing between panels

## Root Cause
Many renderables don't have max_width constraints, so they expand to fill the terminal width even when that produces ugly output.

## Expected Behavior
Scenes should have sensible max widths (e.g., 120-160 columns) and center content when terminal is wider.

## Files

Layout scene already had max_width constraints.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1mam","title":"BUG: Panel titles/subtitles show raw markup instead of styled text","description":"## Problem Statement

Panel titles and subtitles in demo_showcase panels_scene render markup as literal text instead of styled output.

## Specific Evidence

```
╭────────── [bold cyan]Styled Title[/] ──────────╮   ← Should be cyan+bold
╰─────────────── [dim]Right-aligned subtitle[/] ─╯   ← Should be dimmed

╭────────── [green]Status[/] ──────────╮             ← Should be green
│  [bold green]Deployment successful[/]│             ← Should be bold+green

┏━━━━━━ [bold yellow]Warning[/] ━━━━━━━┓             ← Should be bold+yellow
┃  [yellow]Memory usage is at 85%[/]   ┃             ← Should be yellow
```

## Blocked By

- **bd-3sxn**: Root cause fix for markup parsing consistency

## Implementation (after bd-3sxn is complete)

Update panels_scene.rs to use new markup-aware Panel API:

```rust
// BEFORE (broken):
Panel::from_text(content).title("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]")

// AFTER (fixed):
Panel::from_text(content).title_markup("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]")
// OR if Panel auto-parses:
Panel::from_text(content).title(Text::from_markup("[bold cyan]Styled Title[/]"))
```

## Testing Requirements

### Unit Test (in panels_scene or panel.rs tests)

```rust
#[test]
fn test_panels_scene_no_raw_markup() {
    init_test_logging();
    let console = test_console();
    console.begin_capture();
    
    // Run the panels scene
    run_panels_scene(&console);
    
    let output = console.export_text();
    
    // Check for common markup patterns that should NOT appear
    let forbidden = ["[bold", "[dim]", "[green]", "[yellow]", "[cyan]", "[italic]"];
    for pattern in forbidden {
        assert\!(\!output.contains(pattern), 
            "Raw markup {} found in panels scene output", pattern);
    }
}
```

### Visual Verification Script

```bash
# tests/scripts/verify_panels_scene.sh
cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features showcase -- --scene panels --no-interactive 2>&1 | \
  grep -E '\[bold|\[dim|\[green|\[yellow' && \
  echo 'FAIL: Raw markup found' && exit 1 || \
  echo 'PASS: No raw markup'
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All Panel titles in panels_scene render with styles
- [ ] All Panel subtitles render with styles
- [ ] Panel body content with markup renders correctly
- [ ] No literal `[tag]` patterns in scene output
- [ ] Unit test verifies no raw markup
- [ ] Visual verification script passes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-28T22:45:38.650074132Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:58:35.621405930Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:51:47.661525607Z","close_reason":"Fixed: Added title_from_markup() and subtitle_from_markup() methods to Panel that parse Rich markup. Added 3 unit tests. Existing behavior preserved for title()/subtitle().","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","rendering"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1mam","depends_on_id":"bd-3sxn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T22:58:35.621362629Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Time-based validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:07.622886177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:11.630877116Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:11.630813488Z","close_reason":"progress*.rs has 41 tests covering: static progress display, animated updates, speed calculations, ETA display, multiple bars, custom styles, and completion states.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1mre","depends_on_id":"bd-20dk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:58:58.356656274Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1mre","depends_on_id":"bd-vh8c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:55:07.626300172Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-1rr2","title":"Dashboard scene shows no actual dashboard content in interactive mode","description":"## Description
The dashboard scene is supposed to display a live split-screen dashboard with Pipeline, Services, and Logs panels.

## Actual Behavior
When running demo_showcase, the dashboard scene only shows:
- 'Pipeline completed successfully'
- 'Completed in 18.9s'

No panels visible at all.

## Expected Behavior
Should show full dashboard layout with three panels containing live-updating content.

## Root Cause
The Live mode with transient=true clears the dashboard after stop(). The DashboardRenderable content is rendered but immediately cleared.

## Files
- src/bin/demo_showcase/dashboard_scene.rs
- src/live.rs","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-29T00:16:48.491151439Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:21:41.288206223Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T00:21:41.288140661Z","close_reason":"Fixed: Changed transient=true to transient=false so dashboard persists after Live stop()","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1sa","title":"Optimize Style::render_ansi to return Arc<(String, String)>","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T01:35:25.420623975Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T01:40:45.789567104Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T01:40:45.789525896Z","close_reason":"Optimized Style::render_ansi to return Arc","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1ssn","title":"FEATURE: Implement outro scene for demo_showcase","description":"## Feature: Outro Scene Implementation

The outro scene is the final scene in demo_showcase. It should provide a satisfying conclusion that summarizes what was shown and guides users to next steps.

## Current State

```
──────────────────────────────────────────────
outro

(Scene outro not yet implemented)
──────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Proposed Design

### 1. Summary Section

```
╭────────────────── Demo Complete ──────────────────╮
│                                                   │
│  ✨ You've seen rich_rust in action\! ✨           │
│                                                   │
│  Features demonstrated:                           │
│  ├── Styled text with markup                     │
│  ├── Tables, Panels, and Trees                   │
│  ├── Progress bars and Live updates              │
│  ├── Syntax highlighting (100+ languages)        │
│  ├── Markdown and JSON rendering                 │
│  └── Export to HTML/SVG                          │
│                                                   │
╰───────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

### 2. Quick Start Section

```
                    Quick Start

   cargo add rich_rust

   ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ use rich_rust::prelude::*;                   │
   │                                              │
   │ let console = Console::new();                │
   │ console.print("[bold green]Hello\![/]");      │
   └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 3. Resources Section

```
                     Resources

   📖 Documentation:  docs.rs/rich_rust
   📦 Crates.io:      crates.io/crates/rich_rust
   📁 Repository:     github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust
   🐛 Issues:         github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust/issues
```

### 4. Sign-off

```
────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Made with 🦀 by rich_rust contributors

  Run again: demo_showcase --list-scenes
  Export:    demo_showcase --export

────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Implementation

### File: src/bin/demo_showcase/outro_scene.rs

```rust
pub fn run_outro_scene(console: &Console, _state: &DemoState) -> Result<()> {
    tracing::info\!("Starting outro scene");
    
    // 1. Completion panel
    let completion = Panel::from_text(format\!(
        "{}\n\n{}\n{}",
        "✨ You've seen rich_rust in action\! ✨",
        "Features demonstrated:",
        build_feature_tree()
    ))
    .title("Demo Complete")
    .padding((1, 2));
    
    console.print_renderable(&completion);
    
    // 2. Quick start
    console.rule(Some("Quick Start"));
    console.print("   cargo add rich_rust\n");
    
    let code = Syntax::new(QUICK_START_CODE, "rust")
        .line_numbers(false);
    console.print_renderable(&code);
    
    // 3. Resources
    console.rule(Some("Resources"));
    let resources = build_resources_table();
    console.print_renderable(&resources);
    
    // 4. Sign-off
    console.print("\n");
    console.rule(None);
    console.print(Align::center("Made with 🦀 by rich_rust contributors"));
    console.print("\n");
    console.print(Align::center("Run again: demo_showcase --list-scenes"));
    console.print(Align::center("Export:    demo_showcase --export"));
    console.rule(None);
    
    Ok(())
}
```

## Testing Requirements

### Unit Tests

```rust
#[test]
fn test_outro_scene_renders_content() {
    let console = test_console();
    console.begin_capture();
    
    run_outro_scene(&console, &test_state()).unwrap();
    
    let output = console.export_text();
    
    // Must contain key sections
    assert\!(output.contains("Demo Complete") || output.contains("rich_rust"));
    assert\!(output.contains("cargo add"));
    assert\!(output.contains("docs.rs") || output.contains("Documentation"));
}

#[test]
fn test_outro_scene_has_resources_links() {
    let console = test_console();
    console.begin_capture();
    
    run_outro_scene(&console, &test_state()).unwrap();
    
    let output = console.export_text();
    
    assert\!(output.contains("crates.io"));
    assert\!(output.contains("github.com"));
    assert\!(output.contains("docs.rs"));
}
```

### E2E Tests

```rust
#[test]
fn test_e2e_outro_scene_not_placeholder() {
    init_test_logging();
    
    let output = Command::new("cargo")
        .args(["run", "--bin", "demo_showcase", "--features", "showcase",
               "--", "--scene", "outro", "--no-interactive"])
        .output()
        .expect("Failed to run");
    
    let stdout = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout);
    
    // Should NOT contain placeholder text
    assert\!(\!stdout.contains("not yet implemented"),
        "Outro still shows placeholder");
    assert\!(\!stdout.contains("(Scene outro"),
        "Outro still shows placeholder");
    
    // Should contain actual content
    assert\!(stdout.len() > 200, "Outro too short");
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Outro scene renders complete content (not placeholder)
- [ ] Shows feature summary (Table or Tree)
- [ ] Shows quick start code example with syntax highlighting
- [ ] Shows resource links (docs.rs, crates.io, github)
- [ ] Includes sign-off with run/export hints
- [ ] No "not yet implemented" text
- [ ] Unit tests verify content presence
- [ ] E2E test confirms placeholder removed","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-28T22:47:15.576408429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T23:08:19.047232674Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T23:08:19.047160840Z","close_reason":"Implemented outro scene with feature summary table, Get Started resources, What Next tree, and thanks message with branding. All tests pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","scene"]}

 {"id":"bd-1ub","title":"Close Rich port gaps: parity, conformance, missing features","description":"Goal: close every remaining gap in the Python Rich -> rich_rust port by (1) establishing authoritative parity documentation, (2) adding true conformance tests against Python Rich output, and (3) implementing currently-missing features (Live, Layout, logging handler, HTML/SVG export) or explicitly documenting scope decisions.\n\nWhy: README still lists missing Rich features; spec/docs are out of sync with implemented functionality; conformance tests do not compare against Python Rich. This epic coordinates the remediation so future work does not rely on tribal knowledge.\n\nDefinition of done: FEATURE_PARITY.md exists and is authoritative; RICH_SPEC/README are consistent; conformance fixtures exist and are enforced; each missing feature is either implemented with tests/docs or explicitly excluded with rationale.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:24:50.961255334Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T10:26:09.960421969Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T10:26:09.960404606Z","close_reason":"All parity docs, conformance harness, and missing features completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
